steps.title: Identify the structural position
steps.content: The blank appears between profile and in the Navajo Times on August 22, 2013. We need a word that modifies “profile” to complete the noun phrase a profile _____ in the Navajo Times.

steps.title: Apply the participial modifier rule
steps.content:
appearing is a participle that modifies “profile” — a profile appearing in the Navajo Times on August 22, 2013 is a standard noun phrase construction. A participle (an -ing verb form) can modify a noun directly in this position.

The other choices use finite verbs (has appeared, appeared, appears) that cannot modify a noun; they would require a relative pronoun like “that” to work, creating a profile that appeared instead of fitting the available blank.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
